item.title: LEGO Friends Beach Smoothie Stand Kids’ Pretend Play Food Set Gift Idea for Girls and Boys Aged 6 and over with 2 Mini-Dolls a Turtle Figure and Accessories 42625
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Friends Beach Smoothie Stand Kids’ Pretend Play Food Set Gift Idea for Girls and Boys Aged 6 and over with 2 Mini-Dolls a Turtle Figure and Accessories 42625 here: ℹ️: 2 LEGO Friends characters – This set comes with a turtle figure, plus a Niko mini-doll and a Nova LEGO Friends mini-doll with an extra face Create the beach scene – As well as a buildable smoothie stand, this set comes with a buildable beach buggy, a swing, a cooler and a signpost Lots of accessories – Includes strawberry, banana, blueberry, orange, yoghurt and peanut butter smoothie ingredients, plus glasses and much more Play food set – This LEGO Friends Beach Smoothie Stand role-play toy for 6-plus-year-old girls and boys includes 2 mini-dolls and a turtle figure Mix up smoothie combinations – Imaginative play is lots of fun with this LEGO Friends set as kids choose ingredients and place them in the blender A gift idea for kids – This LEGO Friends set makes a fun gift idea for 6-plus-year-old girls, boys and kids who love food toys and friendship stories 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Friends Adventure Camp Tree House Camping Playset Toy for 8 Plus Year Old Girls and Boys Building Set 5 Mini-Dolls and 5 Animal Figures Birthday Gift Idea for Kids 42631
item.description: You can find LEGO Friends Adventure Camp Tree House Camping Playset Toy for 8 Plus Year Old Girls and Boys Building Set 5 Mini-Dolls and 5 Animal Figures Birthday Gift Idea for Kids 42631 with a discount here: ℹ️: 5 mini-dolls – This building toy for kids comes with friends characters Leo, Aliya, Jamila and Olly, plus camp counsellor Jonathan mini-doll figures Obstacle course – Kids build the obstacle course, then put the LEGO Friends characters to the test on the zip line, climbing wall and log bridge A gift packed with friendship stories – This building set makes a great gift for 8-plus-year-old girls and boys who love outdoor playsets and camping adventures Nature-spotting adventures – The learning toy set features hidden minibeasts and woodland creatures, including beavers and a squirrel Dynamic LEGO Friends characters – The Leo and Olly mini-dolls have alternate faces to show their reactions as they take on new challenges Camping playset – The LEGO Friends Adventure Camp Tree House toy for 8+-year-old girls and boys comes with 5 mini-dolls and lots of animal figures Creative play accessories – Summer camp accessories include a campfire, foraging guide and basket, water bottles, granola bars, life jackets, sleeping bags, walkie-talkies, a telescope, a radio and more 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO 42112 Technic Concrete Mixer Truck Toy Construction Vehicle
item.description: You can find LEGO 42112 Technic Concrete Mixer Truck Toy Construction Vehicle with a discount here: ℹ️: This is an ideal gift for kids aged 10 and up who love vehicles, construction toys and seeing how things works Use the handle to control the funnel to pour the concrete bricks into position on site after being mixed in the truck With 1,163 pieces and measuring 42cm in length, kids will enjoy a challenging build before exploring all the awesome features of the truck Features include moving wheels and motor, opening cabin door, rotating drum and 100 individual LEGO bricks to load and unload as concrete Discover all the cool functions of this Concrete Mixer Truck with rotating mixer drum - the model looks and moves just like the real thing Turn the truck’s drum manually to mix the concrete bricks or set the drum to rotate automatically as the truck drives along 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars Mos Espa Podrace Diorama Set for Adults Buildable The Phantom Menace Model Kit Features Anakin Skywalker’s Podracer Memorabilia Gifts for Men Women Him or Her 75380
item.description: You can find LEGO Star Wars Mos Espa Podrace Diorama Set for Adults Buildable The Phantom Menace Model Kit Features Anakin Skywalker’s Podracer Memorabilia Gifts for Men Women Him or Her 75380 with a discount here: ℹ️: LEGO Star Wars Diorama set – Capture a moment from the Mos Espa Podrace in Star Wars: The Phantom Menace with this model kit for adults to build Made for display – This LEGO Star Wars memorabilia set features the Arch Canyon part of Tatooine’s Mos Espa Podracing circuit Celebrating 25 years of LEGO Star Wars – The model kit also includes a LEGO Star Wars 25th anniversary brick and a plaque with a Qui-Gon Jinn quote Intuitive instructions – Using the LEGO Builder app, you can zoom, rotate and visualise a digital version of this Star Wars model as you build Star Wars gift for adults – This premium-quality set makes a great Star Wars-themed gift for men, women, him or her, or as a treat for yourself, another Star Wars fan or a collector of LEGO Star Wars dioramas Build your collection – This set is part of a series of collectible, buildable LEGO Star Wars diorama models (sold separately) that depict iconic Star Wars moments Brick-built Star Wars Podracers – This LEGO Star Wars set for adults includes detailed models of Anakin Skywalker’s and his rival Sebulba’s Podracers 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars: The Mandalorian Paz Vizsla and Moff Gideon Battle Collectible Building Toy for Kids with 4 Character Minifigures Creative Gift Idea for 7 Plus Year Old Boys and Girls 75386
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Star Wars: The Mandalorian Paz Vizsla and Moff Gideon Battle Collectible Building Toy for Kids with 4 Character Minifigures Creative Gift Idea for 7 Plus Year Old Boys and Girls 75386 here: ℹ️: Interactive digital building – Using the LEGO Builder app, kids can zoom in, rotate and visualise a digital version of this model as they build LEGO Star Wars buildable toy – Relive a scene from Star Wars: The Mandalorian Season 3 with this Paz Vizsla and Moff Gideon Battle set Star Wars: The Mandalorian gift idea for kids – This LEGO creative toy makes an out-of-this-world birthday gift for 7+-year-old boys, girls and any young Star Wars: The Mandalorian fan LEGO Star Wars set – The base in this set has an armoured door with a slam-shut trigger and control panels, plus a rotating, stud-shooting turret Accessories – A heavy blaster for Paz Vizsla, a jetpack for Moff Gideon, weapons for the Praetorian Guards, plus a box containing a thermal detonator Build and connect – The Mandalorian base in this LEGO Star Wars: The Mandalorian collectible set connects to the buildable rock/cave in the (75373) Ambush on Mandalore Battle Pack, sold separately 4 collectible LEGO Star Wars: The Mandalorian minifigures – Characters Paz Vizsla, Moff Gideon and 2 Imperial Praetorian Guards 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Friends Adventure Camp Water Sports Building Toy for Kids Role-Play Gift Idea for 7 Plus Year Old Girls and Boys with 3 Mini-Doll Characters and a Bear Figure Educational Set 42626
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Friends Adventure Camp Water Sports Building Toy for Kids Role-Play Gift Idea for 7 Plus Year Old Girls and Boys with 3 Mini-Doll Characters and a Bear Figure Educational Set 42626 at the following link: ℹ️: 3 LEGO Friends characters – This educational toy comes with Autumn, Liann and Zac mini-dolls, a bear figure, plus 2 kayaks to launch from the dock A gift idea – This camping toy set makes a great gift 7-plus-year-old girls, boys and kids who love role play and outdoor adventure activities A LEGO Friends set for kids – This LEGO building toy for 7+-year-old girls and boys comes with 3 mini-dolls, a bear figure and lots of accessories Explore new passions – Check out other LEGO building toys (sold separately) in the Friends universe, where kids discover diverse characters and act out real-life adventures Imaginative play – Kids can tell stories as they try the activities, from kayaking, fishing and raft building to painting and skipping stones Water sports accessories – Comes with fishing rods, oars, helmets, life jackets, trophies, flippers, table tennis table, a kayaking badge and more 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO DUPLO | Disney Ariel’s Magical Underwater Palace The Little Mermaid Building Toy for 2 Plus Year Old Toddlers Girls & Boys Castle Set with Figures Educational Learning Toys Gift Idea 10435
item.description: You can find LEGO DUPLO | Disney Ariel’s Magical Underwater Palace The Little Mermaid Building Toy for 2 Plus Year Old Toddlers Girls & Boys Castle Set with Figures Educational Learning Toys Gift Idea 10435 with a discount here: ℹ️: Educational toy for toddlers – LEGO DUPLO | Disney building toys support emotional and developmental learning through fun-filled, creative playtimes Toddler learning toys – Kids hone their fine motor skills using fun functions such as the spinning buildable toy dancefloor and the movable swing A treat for Little Mermaid fans – This colourful building toy is a fun Disney-themed gift for 2-plus-year-old girls, boys and for toddlers who love role-play toys and the Disney Junior Ariel TV show Buildable castle toy home of Ariel – Toddlers enjoy undersea construction fun with the LEGO DUPLO | Disney Ariel’s Magical Underwater Palace Lots of accessories – In the bedroom, ballroom and play area are elements to spark stories, such as a brush, camera, guitar, pitcher and plate 3 familiar characters – kids explore the castle from the Disney Junior Ariel TV show with LEGO DUPLO | Disney figures of Ariel, Fernie and Sebastian 🛒 Buy it!
